caption:
"That’s a wrap! Fall 2020 IS OVER!!!!

caption:
"ATTENTION ALL LATINX CADA STUDENTS!

LARES and CADA have collaborated to create an online space for Latinx CADA students to connect with their advisors and peers. The goal is for our Latinx CADA students to feel a sense of community and support from peers and advisors.

During these meetings you will have the opportunity to meet and learn from other CADA students, be kept up to date with LARES and CADA opportunities and more! For more information email Margarita Bautista at mbauti21@uic.edu #uiclares #uiccada".
caption_raw:
45 likes, 0 comments - uiclares1975 October 7, 2020: "ATTENTION ALL LATINX CADA STUDENTS!

LARES and CADA have collaborated to create an online space for Latinx CADA students to connect with their advisors and peers. The goal is for our Latinx CADA students to feel a sense of community and support from peers and advisors.

During these meetings you will have the opportunity to meet and learn from other CADA students, be kept up to date with LARES and CADA opportunities and more! For more information email Margarita Bautista at mbauti21@uic.edu #uiclares #uiccada".

caption:
"Big announcement!!!! 
UIC received the Seal of Excelencia! Excelencia in Education recognized colleges and universities across the Nation who intentionally serve Latino students and who demonstrate positive student outcomes!

The LARES program is thrilled that UIC received this award. This award is made possible by the LARES program who has paved the way for Latina/o/x to access and graduate from higher education for the past 45 yrs at UIC & the State of Illinois. And all the other units across UIC that truly care for the success of our UIC Latinx students.

LARES is blessed to have amazing advisors & strong leadership who make our program so strong and who truly care about our Latina/o/x UIC students! This award is a reminder that we will continue to be a Hispanic Serving Institution! To learn more about this award visit edexcelencia.org
#HSIProud #LARESMade".
caption_raw:
56 likes, 0 comments - uiclares1975 October 1, 2020: "Big announcement!!!! 
UIC received the Seal of Excelencia! Excelencia in Education recognized colleges and universities across the Nation who intentionally serve Latino students and who demonstrate positive student outcomes!

The LARES program is thrilled that UIC received this award. This award is made possible by the LARES program who has paved the way for Latina/o/x to access and graduate from higher education for the past 45 yrs at UIC & the State of Illinois. And all the other units across UIC that truly care for the success of our UIC Latinx students.

LARES is blessed to have amazing advisors & strong leadership who make our program so strong and who truly care about our Latina/o/x UIC students! This award is a reminder that we will continue to be a Hispanic Serving Institution! To learn more about this award visit edexcelencia.org
#HSIProud #LARESMade".

caption:
"Happy first day of fall 2020 semester! This academic year will be fueled by Coffee/Tea, good music, y muchas ganas!

Good luck, you got this!!!!".

caption:
"Breaking News: DACA is here to stay!!!
We are extremely happy for our students and friends!!!! Let’s continue to organize to keep our undocumented students in college & continue to support them in EVERY aspect of the college experience! #HereToStay🦋#YouBelongHere

Students, LARES advisors are available for phone or zoom calls should you have questions about your RISE Act application or Fall 2020 courses.".

Students, LARES advisors are available for phone or zoom calls should you have questions about your RISE Act application or Fall 2020 courses.".

caption:
"The Latin American Recruitment and Educational Services program stands in solidarity with the Black Lives Matter movement and remains deeply committed to advocating against the violence that continues to be inflicted upon Black lives in the United States. As a program that is grounded in social justice ideals, we condemn any form of racism, oppression, and violence imposed on people of color and our communities. 
As we take a moment to reflect on how we can better serve our students and communities of color, we ask all institutions of higher education to do the same. 
Black Lives DO MATTER in the United States, in Latin America, and throughout the rest of the world. The LARES program stands in solidarity and as an ally with those who continue to face systemic oppression and injustice.
We see you, we hear you, we are here for you and with you! We stand together always. 
LARES siempre esta contigo.
✊🏿✊🏽❤️".
caption_raw:
59 likes, 0 comments - uiclares1975 June 2, 2020: "The Latin American Recruitment and Educational Services program stands in solidarity with the Black Lives Matter movement and remains deeply committed to advocating against the violence that continues to be inflicted upon Black lives in the United States. As a program that is grounded in social justice ideals, we condemn any form of racism, oppression, and violence imposed on people of color and our communities. 
As we take a moment to reflect on how we can better serve our students and communities of color, we ask all institutions of higher education to do the same. 
Black Lives DO MATTER in the United States, in Latin America, and throughout the rest of the world. The LARES program stands in solidarity and as an ally with those who continue to face systemic oppression and injustice.
We see you, we hear you, we are here for you and with you! We stand together always. 
LARES siempre esta contigo.
✊🏿✊🏽❤️".
